text: I was once told that AI would change everything.
It has made us faster, but it hasn't changed how we work together.
We write more, we prompt more, but we do more, but all that output has to go somewhere.
On red chats, endless notifications, bloated docs, long PRs.
Too much to read, too much to absorb, and none of it feels high value.
I've personally felt this pain while scaling a billion-dollar business.
I'm Sergei.
I'm the CEO and co-founder of Highlight.
I've spent the last 20 years building consumer products at scale.
I believe that AI should help us get back time.
Time to think, space to create, room for human connection.
To do this, AI has to move beyond the chat box.
It needs to work alongside you, know what you and your team knows,
and take care of the busy work.
Imagine you leave a meeting and your follow-ups are already drafted for you.
You can go heads down without falling behind.
And when you come up for air, you see what you missed,
synthesized across meetings, chats, and platforms.
Your team chat is quieter because information already goes where it should.
That's the kind of future we want for ourselves.
An intelligent work OS for your team with shared memory,
multiplayer agents, and proactive execution.
And that's exactly what we're building.
We're a team of system stinkers who are obsessed with product and user behavior.
We're building the future of work.
If this sounds like your kind of problem, come build with us
and help us shape the future of work together.
